zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg於1204年出生在德國布勞恩史維布勞恩史維時，他的父親Wilhelm von Lüneburg20歲，母親Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark24歲。他於1228年與Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg在德國布勞恩史維結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1252年6月9日在德國尼德薩辛盧包格享年48歲，埋葬在德國尼德薩辛布勞恩史維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg于1204年出生在德国布勞恩史維布勞恩史維时，他的父亲Wilhelm von Lüneburg20岁，母亲Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark24岁。他于1228年与Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg在德国布勞恩史維结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1252年6月9日在德国尼德薩辛盧包格享年48岁，埋葬在德国尼德薩辛布勞恩史維。

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg was born in 1204, in Brunswick, Brunswick, Germany, his father, Wilhelm von Lüneburg, was 20 and his mother, Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark, was 24. He married Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg in 1228, in Brunswick, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 9 June 1252, in Lüneburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, at the age of 48, and was buried in Brunswick, Lower Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg est né en 1204, à Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Allemagne, son père, Wilhelm von Lüneburg, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg en 1228, à Braunschweig, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 9 juin 1252, à Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Allemagne.

Er hat 1228 in Braunschweig, Deutschland Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Juni 1252 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Deutschland begraben.

Lui sposato Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg nel 1228, nel Braunschweig, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburgが1204年にドイツブラウンスチウエイグブラウンスチウエイグで生まれた時，父Wilhelm von Lüneburgは20歳，母Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmarkは24歳であった。1228年にドイツブラウンスチウエイグでMarkgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1252年6月9日にドイツニーダーサチセンルuネブルグで48歳で死去し，ドイツニーダーサチセンブラウンスチウエイグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(이)가 1204년 독일 브라슈위그 브라슈위그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wilhelm von Lüneburg(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1228년 독일 브라슈위그에서 Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1252년 6월 9일 독일 니더작센 u니버그에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 니더작센 브라슈위그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg nasceu em 1204, em Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Alemanha, seu pai, Wilhelm von Lüneburg, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg em 1228, em Braunschweig, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de junho de 1252, em Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto I. gen. das Kind Herzog von Braunschweig-Lüneburg родился в 1204 г. в местности браунщвиг, браунщвиг, Германия, его отцу по имени Wilhelm von Lüneburg было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Helena Valdemarsdatter of Denmark, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg в 1228 г. в местности браунщвиг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 9 июня 1252 г. в местности лuнебург, ниедирсачсен, Германия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности браунщвиг, ниедирсачсен, Германия.

Se casó con Markgräfin Mathilde von Brandenburg von Braunschweig Lüneburg en 1228, en Braunschweig, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 9 de junio de 1252, en Lüneburg, Niedersachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemania.
